test_cases.title: Extension editor method forwards to WS as extension.ui_request
test_cases.description: pi extension_ui_request with method='editor' is translated to ServerMessage type='extension.ui_request' with method='editor', title, and prefill fields
steps: Feed pi event {type:'extension_ui_request', method:'editor', id:'r1', title:'Edit', prefill:'hello'}

test_cases.title: Extension setEditorText forwards to WS as extension:setEditorText
test_cases.description: pi extension_ui_request with method='set_editor_text' is translated to ServerMessage type='extension:setEditorText' with text field
steps: Feed pi event {type:'extension_ui_request', method:'set_editor_text', text:'new content'}

test_cases.title: Extension error reads correct field and includes errorEvent
test_cases.description: pi extension_error uses extensionPath (not extensionName) and forwards event name as errorEvent
steps: Feed pi event {type:'extension_error', extensionPath:'a/b/c.ts', error:'fail', event:'tool_execution'}

test_cases.title: Message start with bashExecution role routes correctly
test_cases.description: pi message_start with role='bashExecution' is translated to message.bashExecution with command, output, exitCode
steps: Feed pi event {type:'message_start', message:{role:'bashExecution', command:'ls', output:'file.txt', exitCode:0}}

test_cases.title: Message start with compactionSummary role routes correctly
test_cases.description: pi message_start with role='compactionSummary' is translated to message.compactionSummary
steps: Feed pi event {type:'message_start', message:{role:'compactionSummary', summary:'compacted', tokensBefore:50000}}

test_cases.title: Message start with branchSummary role routes correctly
test_cases.description: pi message_start with role='branchSummary' is translated to message.branchSummary
steps: Feed pi event {type:'message_start', message:{role:'branchSummary', summary:'branched', fromId:'e1'}}

test_cases.title: Auto retry start/end events forwarded
test_cases.description: pi auto_retry_start and auto_retry_end events are translated to message.auto_retry_start/end

test_cases.title: Queue update event forwarded with steering and followUp
test_cases.description: pi queue_update is translated to message.queue_update preserving steering and followUp arrays

test_cases.title: Tool execution end preserves image content
test_cases.description: pi tool_execution_end with image blocks in result.content extracts images array in output

test_cases.title: Agent end preserves responseModel and diagnostics
test_cases.description: pi agent_end extracts lastMsg.responseModel and diagnostics into message.complete payload

test_cases.title: Message update error subtype forwarded as stream_error
test_cases.description: pi message_update with assistantMessageEvent.type='error' is translated to message.stream_error

test_cases.title: Session info changed maps to session.renamed
test_cases.description: pi session_info_changed with name field maps to session.renamed

test_cases.title: Thinking level changed maps to session.thinkingLevelSet
test_cases.description: pi thinking_level_changed with level field maps to session.thinkingLevelSet

test_cases.title: Extension setTitle forwards to WS as extension:setTitle
test_cases.description: pi extension_ui_request with method='setTitle' is translated to extension:setTitle

test_cases.title: Event-bus on() accepts ServerMessageType and emits correctly
test_cases.description: on('message.text_delta', handler) compiles and handler receives ServerMessage when emit is called
steps: Call on('message.text_delta', handler) where handler is (msg: ServerMessage) => void
Verify handler was called with correct ServerMessage

test_cases.title: Event-bus invalid type causes compile error
test_cases.description: Passing a non-ServerMessageType string to on() should fail TypeScript compilation

test_cases.title: All existing on() calls compile without modification
test_cases.description: All 13 existing event listeners in useChat.ts compile with the new typed signatures
steps: Verify no type errors in useChat.ts

test_cases.title: onAutoRetryStart populates ChatStore.autoRetryState
test_cases.description: Auto-retry start event sets active=true and correct attempt/maxAttempts in store
steps: Dispatch message.auto_retry_start with sessionId and attempt data

test_cases.title: onQueueUpdate populates ChatStore.queueState
test_cases.description: Queue update event sets steering and followUp arrays in store
steps: Dispatch message.queue_update with sessionId and steering data

test_cases.title: onSessionRenamed updates SessionStore
test_cases.description: Session renamed event updates the session name in SessionStore
steps: Dispatch session.renamed with sessionId and name

test_cases.title: All new handlers enforce session isolation
test_cases.description: Events with missing or non-matching sessionId are silently ignored
steps: Dispatch message.auto_retry_start with payload missing sessionId
Dispatch with sessionId='other' and verify only 'other' session affected

test_cases.title: ChatStore new fields default to undefined
test_cases.description: New session state has pendingEditorText, autoRetryState, queueState, thinkingLevel, responseModel all undefined
steps: Verify all 5 new fields are undefined

test_cases.title: ChatStore set/clear round-trip works for all new fields
test_cases.description: Setting and clearing each field results in correct values
steps: Repeat for setAutoRetryState, setQueueState, setThinkingLevel, setResponseModel

test_cases.title: ChatStore removeSession cleans up new fields
test_cases.description: After removeSession, all new fields are gone with the session
steps: Set all 5 new fields on a session

test_cases.title: All existing EventAdapter tests still pass
test_cases.description: Run event-adapter-bridge.test.ts and event-adapter-extension.test.ts — all 20 tests pass
steps: Run npx vitest run test/event-adapter-bridge.test.ts test/event-adapter-extension.test.ts

test_cases.title: All existing useChat tests still pass
test_cases.description: Run useChat.test.ts — all 5 tests pass

test_cases.title: Existing text_delta and tool_call event flow unchanged
test_cases.description: Sending text_delta and tool_call_start/end events produces identical output to before
